name: PII Detection
summary: Scans text for personally identifiable information (email, phone, address, license number, and more) and returns each detected span with a confidence score, in Presidio-compatible shape.
description: An LLM-as-a-Judge PII detector that scans a block of text for personally identifiable information and returns findings in the same structured shape as Microsoft Presidio. For each detected span it returns the entity type (UPPER_SNAKE_CASE), a confidence score (0.0-1.0) and the exact matched substring, plus summary fields (has_pii, num_pii_entities, pii_types). The set of entity types to look for is configurable and defaults to EMAIL_ADDRESS, PHONE_NUMBER, ADDRESS and LICENSE_NUMBER.
